description_long: This house is a modern, single-story residence enclosed within a rectangular boundary wall, featuring two main flat-roofed structures separated by a central open-air walkway. The exterior walls are smooth and painted in a light color, with minimalistic landscaping including palm trees and trimmed hedges. The backyard area contains a rectangular swimming pool, a wooden deck with lounge chairs, and a small outdoor dining area. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with several small square and rectangular openings on the roofs and walls, providing natural light while maintaining privacy. The main entryway is accessible via a short staircase leading to a gate in the front wall, and a large garage door is visible on one side. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story house with flat roofs, enclosed by a boundary wall, featuring a pool, landscaped yard, and minimalistic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry gate, short staircase, and two flat-roofed structures with minimal windows.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard with a swimming pool, wooden deck, lounge chairs, and outdoor dining area.
description_view_2: Opposite front view displaying the garage door, trimmed hedges, and the separation between the two main structures.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the pool area, palm trees, and the open space between the house sections.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a short staircase, simple gate, and minimalistic design without decorative elements.
